  1. Home

Now

This now page explains what I’m currently focused on. For more on what I’ve been up to, check my weeknotes.

Now: April 2026

Work

  • Nadda, due to paternity leave this month.

On the side

  • Taking advantage of spare moments to add little bits to this site, like a Links page, a proper footer, and this Now page.
  • Looking at what to do with the Rising Ape Collective website with my friends in Bristol - hoping to archive it gracefully, so much brilliant work recorded there.

Personal

  • Enjoying baby mode again with Kid B, and ‘learning to ride a bike’ mode with Kid A.
  • Squeezing in short runs instead of tag rugby and swimming - maybe these will stick after my leave?
  • Finding time to read books!

Last updated: 8 April 2026

Previously: March 2026

Work

  • Working with groups of experts across content design, data engineering and data ethics on updates for the Government Digital and Data Profession Capability Framework.
  • Website design and content strategy for the new Government Cyber Profession, including the first version of its capability framework.

On the side

  • Setting up the next ‘X-Gov Sheffield meetup’ for public sector folk around here, Tuesday 17 March.

Personal

  • Playing tag rugby and trying to swim one or two times a week.
  • Preparing for Kid B’s imminent arrival in April.
Email: hello@antonypoveda.design
